# Masri quality rubric — maps to `quality_checklist.md`

Use for human review or agent self-check. Score each row **0–2** (0 fail, 1 partial, 2 pass).  
**P0 ship rule:** no zeros on rows marked P0.

| Rubric id | Maps to checklist # | Criterion | P0? |
|-----------|---------------------|-----------|-----|
| R1 | 1 | Language naturalness (living Masri; not translatedese) | Y |
| R2 | 2 | Tone matches `tone_matrix.md` + brief + `channel_formats.md` | Y |
| R3 | 3 | Humour appropriate per `humour_guidelines.md` (or N/A → 2) | Y |
| R4 | 4 | Code-switching balance | N |
| R5 | 5 | SEO integration without stuffing | N |
| R6 | 6 | Goal achievement + CTA closure | Y |
| R7 | 7 | Length suits channel (incl. video supers) | Y |
| R8 | 8 | Brand and factual integrity (no invented stats/offers) | Y |
| R9 | 9 | Platform fit (emoji, line length, audience address) | N |
| R10 | 10 | Legal / medical / financial sensitivity | Y |
| R11 | 11 | Accessibility skim (headings, mobile, RTL) | N |
| R12 | 12 | Bilingual parity when EN requested | N |

**Sign-off:** Same as `quality_checklist.md` — *هل نص مصري أصيل يقرأه مصري فيقول ده مكتوب بإيد واحدة مننا؟*

**Golden pairs:** see `evaluation/golden_pairs.jsonl` (append-only; Law 151 safe samples).
